nasb.text: After all this, when Josiah had set the temple in order, Neco king of Egypt came up to make war at Carchemish on the Euphrates, and Josiah went out to engage him.

esv.text: After all this, when Josiah had prepared the temple, Neco king of Egypt went up to fight at Carchemish on the Euphrates, and Josiah went out to meet him.

cnv.text: 約西亞整理好聖殿的一切事以後，埃及王尼哥上來，幫助靠近幼發拉底河的迦基米施；約西亞就出去阻擋他。

ccb.text: 约西亚办理完殿里的事后，埃及王尼哥上来，要攻打幼发拉底河附近的迦基米施。约西亚出兵拦阻。
